title: Four parts, a different line direction in each

rule.instruction: Four-part drawing with a different line direction in each part.

restrictions: Faithful execution. The 300x300mm square is divided into four equal quadrants; each quadrant is filled with evenly-spaced straight parallel lines in ONE direction, and all four quadrants use a DIFFERENT one of the four kinds of lines (vertical, horizontal, diagonal /, diagonal \). Monochrome black on white. The 16 executions vary the assignment of directions to quadrants (the permutation) and the line spacing. Applying learnings: each part is inherently legible (single direction), so pursue per-part variety via the permutation and keep moderate, breathing spacing; avoid over-density.
